contract: {rating, notes} — exactly two keys, rating int 0-100, notes non-empty, one bare JSON object
comment: schema_cases run with NO model (pure Python via network_spec.schema_ok) and MUST pass exactly as marked — the deterministic forcing function for output shape. band_cases are the labeled held-out examples; the runner checks the reference oracle lands in band (a known-good baseline) and that an empty emission scores 0.0 (cannot saturate). A live agent's recorded outputs can be checked the same way once a run exists. Prose is never compared.

output.notes: No problems found through the network lens; no change needed.

while True retries a non-idempotent POST on every exception with no backoff, no attempt cap, and no idempotency key, so a flaky network duplicates the write; cap attempts with exponential backoff and jitter and add an idempotency key to reach 100.

tournament_baseline.note: post-tournament best score for the shared prompt (claude-cli shim, non-deterministic backend — treat as a soft baseline).
